query:
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS loginMethod VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'email' AFTER email;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255) AFTER loginMethod;
